# Tirthesh Jain - Performance Marketing Specialist

> Top Performance Marketer in Ahmedabad. Specialized in Google Ads, Meta Ads, and ROI-driven Growth Marketing.

## About
I am Tirthesh Jain, a growth marketer helping businesses scale their revenue through data-driven performance marketing strategies.
